revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Align]]: importing template for usage on this wiki. It is used a lot

revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:Align]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]" to " <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Align]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: Robot - Speedily moving category Formatting templates to Wikipedia formatting templates per [[WP:CFD|CFD]].

revision.text:
[[File:Joker2.jpg|thumb|center|350px|
Why so serious?
''The Joker'']]

Why so serious?
''The Joker'']]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
1 revision imported: overwriting this template since it seems broken in how it treats unknown parameters in [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]
1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
Bot: tag page without wikidata link [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24744680692|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Align here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{safesubst:#switch: {{safesubst:lc:{{{1|center}}}}} |left =
{{{2}}}
|right =
{{{2}}}
|center = {{safesubst:center|{{{2}}}|style={{{style|}}} }} |#default = Error in [[Template:Align]]: the alignment setting "{{{1}}}" is invalid. }} {{documentation}} [[Category:Pages without wikidata]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Align here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
